mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN id = 0 THEN '系统自动生成' ELSE name END AS name FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (account, password, name, type, create_time) VALUES (#{account}, #{password}, #{name}, #{type, typeHandler=com.text_to_sql.text_to_sql.handler.UserTypeHandler}, #{createTime})
